org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature

Description
org.openapitools.codegen.meta
 
org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
 

  • Uses of GlobalFeature in org.openapitools.codegen.meta

    Methods in org.openapitools.codegen.meta that return types with arguments of type GlobalFeature
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EnumSet<GlobalFeature>
    FeatureSet.getGlobalFeatures()
    Returns the spec features supported "globally" for a document (shared across all operations and/or models).
    Methods in org.openapitools.codegen.meta with parameters of type GlobalFeature
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
    Excludes the defined GlobalFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
    Includes the defined GlobalFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    Method parameters in org.openapitools.codegen.meta with type arguments of type GlobalFeature
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.globalFeatures(EnumSet<GlobalFeature> globalFeatures)
    Sets the globalFeatures and return a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
